item.description: Smart Launcher is a mobile app that provides users with a customized home screen and app launcher on their Android devices. It includes features like minimalist interface, automatic app sorting, and gesture controls. item.title: Download Calendar Widget: Month/Agenda 2026.02.24-306
item.description: Two minimalist, fully customizable and resizable widgets - agenda (list) and month (grid) help you see your daily schedule at a glance right on your home screen. Widget can display events from facebook, google or company calendar. Can also set custom reminders for events from the calendar - so you'll never miss a thing again!

item.title: Download Anti Spy Detector: Anti Hack 49.24.2.26
item.description: With the powerful built-in firewall in this app, you can monitor every outgoing connection each app makes. If you don't trust the app, you can block it from accessing the internet with a firewall to prevent tracking and analysis. Every outgoing IP or domain will be saved and you can see them, the Firewall will show you the address, organization and information about that IP and if you feel suspicious you can block that domain so that application is no longer accessible. item.title: Download WiFi Analyzer Pro 7.0
item.description: WiFi Analyzer Pro is a mobile application that provides users with advanced tools to analyze and optimize their Wi-Fi network. It allows users to monitor Wi-Fi signal strength and quality, view graphical charts of their network's channel usage, and select the optimal channel for their network to minimize interference from other neighboring networks. In addition, WiFi Analyze Pro can help users diagnose connection issues, such as slow speeds or lost connections, by displaying signal...

item.title: Download Image Size - Photo Resizer 10.6
item.description: This app allows you to resize images to any size you like (with limitations), quickly and easily. It is actually a resizing application. You can specify the output format using one of the following four measurement units: pixels, millimeters, centimeters, inches. To maintain aspect ratio, simply tap the chain icon between the width and height input fields. Image Dimensions gives you the option to save, email, print, or share the final image. item.title: Download Carly - OBD2 car scanner 49.76
item.description: Carly is a mobile OBD2 (On-Board Diagnostics) car scanner application that allows users to diagnose, monitor and repair their vehicles. The application works by connecting to the vehicle's OBD2 port, usually located under the dashboard, and collecting data from the vehicle's computer system. The adapter and app work with Audi, BMW, Lexus, Mercedes, Mini, Porsche, Renault, Seat, Skoda, Toyota, VW and most car brands in the world with OBD2 port. Carly - OBD2 car scanner Features Check...
